Description: "Add section 6 on page builder embed fixes and local preview support to the walkthrough"
ReplacementContent:
"## 5. Test Validation & Results

We added comprehensive integration tests for both modules covering theme draft customization and page draft/publish/preview flows with full cross-tenant security checks.

### Theme Engine Tests: 25 Passed
All tests in [themeEngine.test.ts](file:///C:/Users/Administrator/Documents/ChurchOS/src/tests/themeEngine.test.ts) completed successfully:
```text
PASS src/tests/themeEngine.test.ts
  ChurchOS Theme Engine Module
    Module Lifecycle & Logging
      √ should successfully activate theme engine module for tenant
      √ should block activation if required parameters are missing
      √ should list all active theme engine configs for tenant
      ...
    Theme Customization Draft & Publish Workflow
      √ should save theme customization changes to draftSettings without affecting settings
      √ should discard theme draft settings successfully
      √ should promote draftSettings to live settings on publish
      √ should reset customizations to empty config on reset
      √ should enforce tenant isolation and block unauthorized tenant users from theme customization actions
```

### CMS & Page Builder Tests: 21 Passed
All tests in [cms_extended.test.ts](file:///C:/Users/Administrator/Documents/ChurchOS/src/tests/cms_extended.test.ts) completed successfully:
```text
PASS src/tests/cms_extended.test.ts
  ChurchOS CMS Extended Module - Revisions, Menus, Footers & Blocks
    ...
    Page Builder Draft, Publish & Preview Token Flow
      √ should save page layout changes to draftContent (does not affect public render)
      √ should generate a secure temporary preview URL and token
      √ should load draftContent when fetching the page render with a valid previewToken
      √ should block preview rendering if the token is invalid or expired
      √ should promote draftContent to content, set status to published, and clear draftContent upon publishing
      √ should enforce tenant isolation and block unauthorized tenant use
<truncated 1389 bytes>
TargetContent:
"## 5. Test Validation & Results

We added comprehensive integration tests for both modules covering theme draft customization and page draft/publish/preview flows with full cross-tenant security checks.

### Theme Engine Tests: 25 Passed
All tests in [themeEngine.test.ts](file:///C:/Users/Administrator/Documents/ChurchOS/src/tests/themeEngine.test.ts) completed successfully:
```text
PASS src/tests/themeEngine.test.ts
  ChurchOS Theme Engine Module
    Module Lifecycle & Logging
      √ should successfully activate theme engine module for tenant
      √ should block activation if required parameters are missing
      √ should list all active theme engine configs for tenant
      ...
    Theme Customization Draft & Publish Workflow
      √ should save theme customization changes to draftSettings without affecting settings
      √ should discard theme draft settings successfully
      √ should promote draftSettings to live settings on publish
      √ should reset customizations to empty config on reset
      √ should enforce tenant isolation and block unauthorized tenant users from theme customization actions
```

### CMS & Page Builder Tests: 21 Passed
All tests in [cms_extended.test.ts](file:///C:/Users/Administrator/Documents/ChurchOS/src/tests/cms_extended.test.ts) completed successfully:
```text
PASS src/tests/cms_extended.test.ts
  ChurchOS CMS Extended Module - Revisions, Menus, Footers & Blocks
    ...
    Page Builder Draft, Publish & Preview Token Flow
      √ should save page layout changes to draftContent (does not affect public render)
      √ should generate a secure temporary preview URL and token
      √ should load draftContent when fetching the page render with a valid previewToken
